mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token ( id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, user_agent, ip ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{userAgent}, #{ip} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM refresh_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM refresh_token WHERE expires_at < NOW()
